entity.college_name: College of International Transport and Logistics

establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

overview.short_description: Educational center of excellence in logistics, supply chain management, international transport, and trade in the Middle East and North Africa.
overview.current_status: Active logistics and transport-related academic programs supported by practical training and industry engagement.
overview.future_prospectus: Strengthening regional and international logistics competencies through updated curricula, data-informed decision training, and industry partnerships.

undergraduate: Logistics and International Trade Management Department
Logistics and Supply Chain Management Department
Petroleum and Energy Logistics Management Department
professional_certificates: Higher FIATA Diploma in Supply Chain Management
Medical Centers and Clinic Management Diploma
Mediation and Dispute Resolution Professional Certificate

national: National Authority for Quality Assurance and Accreditation of Education (NAQAAE)
international: AACSB (First accredited college in International Transport, Logistics and Supply Chain Management)

training_and_practice.description: Students complete mandatory summer training and logistics field visits with industry partners.

vision_mission.vision: To be a regional and international center of excellence in logistics, supply chain management, and international transport education, research, and professional development.
vision_mission.mission: Contributing to the social and economic development of the Arab region by offering distinguished change agents qualified through comprehensive educational programs, high calibre faculty, and centers of excellence in research, training, and consultancies while strictly committed to the highest levels of quality.

leadership.name: Prof. Ayman Ragab
leadership.title: Dean – Graduate School of Business Administration, Alexandria

leadership.name: Prof. Khaled Hanafy
leadership.title: Secretary General, Union of Arab Chambers

leadership.name: Prof. Gehan Saleh
leadership.title: Economic Affairs Advisor to Egyptian Prime Minister

tie_break_rules.when: If final scores are close (difference <= 0.05), prefer closer campus to student's city.
If one option beats another by a meaningful margin (difference >= 0.12), choose the better option even if farther.
If top program is not available on student's preferred campus, recommend closest alternative within same program_family.
